LoanTransactionDetailCreate.description:
Loan repayment split accepted by the composite endpoint.

``principal`` and ``interest`` are POSITIVE magnitudes; the service stores
each (when > 0) as its own ``Loan_Journal`` row and copies the values
verbatim (no sign flip). Either portion may be 0 (an interest-only or
principal-only payment) but not both. The journal ``spending`` is the signed
total outflow ``−(principal+interest)``; the service rejects a mismatch.

excute_date.description: YYYYMMDD; defaults to journal.spend_date when omitted.
excute_date.title: Excute Date

interest.description: Interest portion (positive magnitude; an operating cost / expense).
interest.title: Interest

loan_id.description: Existing Loan.loan_id this repayment belongs to.
loan_id.title: Loan Id

memo.description: Free-form memo; defaults to journal.note when omitted.
memo.title: Memo

principal.description: Principal portion (positive magnitude; reduces the loan balance).
principal.title: Principal

LoanTransactionDetailCreate.title: LoanTransactionDetailCreate
